falsification_rule_text: Not supported if, across the four cases: (a) FIRST-ORDER revenue is collected at p<0.05 (acknowledged success) AND (b) forecast- to-realised revenue ratio remains >=0.85 in at least 3/4 cases through year-3 post-introduction AND (c) no statistically detectable emigration response (HNW emigration flow not >1.5x synthetic-control counterfactual at p<0.10) in at least 3/4 cases. A first-order revenue success WITHOUT a yield gap and WITHOUT measurable emigration response would refute the causal chain.

variables_loaded.name: high_net_worth_emigration_count
variables_loaded.source: henley_private_clients_millionaire_report (annual); icij:offshore_leaks_derivatives; ssb:utvandring (NOR by income decile where available); minefi:tax_residency_changes (FRA)

variables_missing.name: asset_reshuffling_into_exempt_classes
variables_missing.source: constructed: share of declared wealth in exempt/undervalued categories (business-asset exemption, pension wrappers, life-insurance wrappers); from tax-declaration aggregates

variables_missing.name: wealth_tax_introduction_or_hike_event
variables_missing.source: constructed: event indicators coded per country (FRA ISF 1982, abolition 2017/IFI 2018; NOR 2022 hike; COL 2022 introduction; ESP 2022 IGF introduction)
